bird.name: Chimney swift
bird.summary: The chimney swift (Chaetura pelagica) is a bird belonging to the swift family Apodidae. A member of the genus Chaetura, it is closely relat…

relations.subject: Chimney swift
relations.evidence: Although the global population is estimated at , it has declined precipitously across the majority of its range. The causes of population declines are largely unclear, but may be related to the alteration of the insect community due to pesticide use in the early half of the 20th century. In Canada, they were listed as threatened by COSEWIC for several years with a likely future listing as a Schedule 1 species of the Species at Risk Act
relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。
